New York State College of Human Ecology. Alumni Affairs and Development Office records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Alumni Affairs and Development Office
23-11-4061
11.4 cubic feet. 11 cubic feet.
1922-2014. Correspondence Correspondence from alumni and alumnae. Collection material in English 8256136
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

RMC Staff

Date modified:

COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence from alumni and alumnae.
Cite As:
New York State College of Human Ecology Alumni Affairs and Development Office records, #23-11-4061. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Boxes 1, 2, and 10 restricted to the permission of the office of origin with the exception of records of deceased alumni.
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae. Cornell University -- : Students.
